title: Create More Automation
description: A simple Create addon adding more methods for automation
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aef22b72c106bdd68cc57b5bb54d9b50060eefcb.png)

# A simple Create addon that adds many new recipes, allowing you to automate many Create and vanilla blocks and items!

**Requirements:**
[Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create/versions)

[JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei/versions) is highly recommended to see the recipe changes and additions

 

**NOTE**: This mod now has two distinct versions. 1.20.1 Forge for before 6.0, and 1.21.1 Neoforge for after 6.0. 
The 1.21.1 Neoforge version features significantly changed recipes and is still under development
